input.inputData:
# Assisted by AI
statements:
  # internal identifier
  - context: trnxId := genUUID()
  
  # Configuration variables from secrets
  - context: apiCreds := "<api_creds>""
  - context: apiBaseUrl := "<api_base_url>"
  
  
  # Configurable redirect URLs
  - context: redirectUrl := "<workflow_callback_url>" + "?trnxId=" + context.trnxId
  - context: successRedirectUrl := context.redirectUrl
  - context: failureRedirectUrl := context.redirectUrl
  
  # Timing configurations
  - context: redirectTime := "5"
  - context: successRedirectTime := "5"
  - context: failureRedirectTime := "5"
  
  # Branding configurations
  - context: >
        logoUrl := "<logo_url>"
  - context: >
        favIconUrl := "<fav_icon_url>"
        
  - context: supportEmail := "<support_email>"
  - context: companyName := "<company_name>"
  
  # Feature flags
  - context: signup := true
  - context: pinlessAuthentication := true
  - context: logoVisible := "true"
  - context: supportEmailVisible := "true"
  - context: getScope := true
  - context: showLoaderState := true
  - context: shortenUrl := true
  
  # Other configurations
  - context: purpose := "kyc" # "kyc" "verification" "compliance" "availing_services" "educational"
  - context: consentValidTill := int(now) + 1800 + 19800 # 1800 : 30 min , 19800 : +5.30 india difference from GMT 
  - context: internalId := context.trnxId
  - context: docType := ["ADHAR"]
  
  # Build request body
  - context: >
        requestBody := {
          "signup": context.signup,
          "pinlessAuthentication": context.pinlessAuthentication,
          "redirectUrl": context.redirectUrl,
          "redirectTime": context.redirectTime,
          "successRedirectUrl": context.successRedirectUrl,
          "successRedirectTime": context.successRedirectTime,
          "failureRedirectUrl": context.failureRedirectUrl,
          "failureRedirectTime": context.failureRedirectTime,
          "logoVisible": context.logoVisible,
          "logo": context.logoUrl,
          "supportEmailVisible": context.supportEmailVisible,
          "supportEmail": context.supportEmail,
          "purpose": context.purpose,
          "getScope": context.getScope,
          "consentValidTill": context.consentValidTill,
          "showLoaderState": context.showLoaderState,
          "internalId": context.internalId,
          "companyName": context.companyName,
          "favIcon": context.favIconUrl,
          "shortenUrl": context.shortenUrl,
          "docType": context.docType
        }
  
  # Make API call to DigiLocker service
  - context: >
      digilockerResponse := hc.Post(
        "https://" + context.apiBaseUrl + "/api/v3/digilocker-v2/createUrl",
        {
          "Content-Type": "application/json",
          "authorization": context.apiCreds
        },
        jsonToString(context.requestBody)
      )
  
  # Return response with correct field mappings
  - return: >
      {
        "http_status": string(context.digilockerResponse.statusCode),
        "digilocker_url": has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.url) ? context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.url : "",
        "digilocker_request_id": has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.requestId) ? context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.requestId : "",
        "trnxId": context.trnxId
      }

statements:
    # - context: >
    #     session_error := (has(context.valid_cache)  && (context.valid_cache == false)) || (has(context.valid_session)  && (context.valid_session == false)) ? true : false
    - if:
        match: >
            (has(context.valid_cache)  && (context.valid_cache == false)) || (has(context.valid_session)  && (context.valid_session == false))
        block:
            - return: >
                {
                    "message_id" : "WFURATMI001E",
                    "message_description" : "The session is invalid. Please restart the flow and complete it within 30 minutes. If the issue persists, contact your system administrator."
                }
    # - context: >
    #     trnxId_not_found_error := (has(context.id)  && (!has(context.trnxId) || (context.trnxId == null) || (context.trnxId == ""))) ? true : false
    - if:
        match: >
            (has(context.trnxId) && (context.trnxId != null)  && (!has(context.requestId) || (context.requestId == null) || (context.requestId == "")))
        block:
            - return: >
                {
                    "message_id" : "WFURATMI002E",
                    "message_description" : "Missing query parameters. Please restart the flow. If the issue persists, contact your system administrator."
                }
    # - context: >
    #     aadhaar_consent_error := has(context.valid) && has(context.aadhaar_consent) && (context.valid == "false" || context.aadhaar_consented == "false") ? true : false
    - if:
        match: >
            has(context.valid) && has(context.aadhaar_consent) && (context.valid == "false" || context.aadhaar_consented == "false")
        block:
            - return: >
                {
                    "message_id" : "WFURATMI003E",
                    "message_description" : "Aadhaar consent is missing. Please restart the flow and complete the consent step. If the issues persist, contact your system administrator."
                }
    # - context: >
    #     digilocker_fetch_error := has(context.ifError)  && context.ifError == "true" ? true : false
    - if:
        match: >
            has(context.ifError)  && context.ifError == "true"
        block:
            - return: >
                {
                    "message_id" : "WFURATMI000E",
                    "message_description" : "Internal server error. Please try again after some time. If the issue persists, contact your system administrator."
                }
    # - context: >
    #     aadhaar_xml_fetch_error := has(context.ifErrorAX)  && context.ifErrorAX == "true" ? true : false
    - if:
        match: >
            has(context.ifErrorAX)  && context.ifErrorAX == "true"
        block:
            - return: >
                {
                    "message_id" : "WFURATMI000E",
                    "message_description" : "Internal server error. Please try again after some time. If the issue persists, contact your system administrator."
                }
    # - context: >
    #     digi_profile_validation_eerror := has(context.valid_digi_profile_match) && context.valid_digi_profile_match == false ? true : false
    - if:
        match: >
            has(context.valid_digi_profile_match) && context.valid_digi_profile_match == false
        block:
            - return: >
                {
                    "message_id" : "WFURATMI004E",
                    "message_description" : "Your Aadhaar details do not match your profile information. Please restart the flow and enter the correct details. If the issue persists, contact your system administrator."
                }
    # - context: >http_status
    #     user_consent_error := has(context.user_consent)  && context.user_consent == "no" ? true : false
    - if:
        match: >
            has(context.user_consent)  && context.user_consent == "no"
        block:
            - return: >
                {
                    "message_id" : "WFURATMI005E",
                    "message_description" : "User consent is missing. Please restart the flow and complete the consent step. If the issues persist, contact your system administrator."
                }
    # - context: >
    #     setu_init_error := has(context.http_status) && (context.http_status!=null)  && (context.http_status != "201") ? true : false
    - if:
        match: >
            has(context.http_status) && (context.http_status!=null)  && (context.http_status != "201")
        block:
            - return: >
                {
                    "message_id" : "WFURATMI000E",
                    "message_description" : "Internal server error. Please try again after some time. If the issue persists, contact your system administrator."
                }
    # - context: >
    #     cache_set_error := has(context.cache_set) && has(context.cache_set.isSuccessful)  && (context.cache_set.isSuccessful != "true") ? true : false
    - if:
        match: >
            has(context.cache_set) && has(context.cache_set.isSuccessful)  && (context.cache_set.isSuccessful != "true")
        block:
            - return: >
                {
                    "message_id" : "WFURATMI000E",
                    "message_description" : "Internal server error. Please try again after some time. If the issue persists, contact your system administrator."
                }
    # - context: >
    #     crearte_user_error := has(context.crearteUserStatus) &&  has(context.crearteUserStatus.result) && !has(context.crearteUserStatus.result.id) ? true : false
    - if:
        match: >
            has(context.crearteUserStatus) &&  has(context.crearteUserStatus.result) && !has(context.crearteUserStatus.result.id)
        block:
            - if: # CSIAI0047E : create user user already exsist 
                match: >
                    has(context.crearteUserStatus.error) && (context.crearteUserStatus.error != "")  && (context.crearteUserStatus.error.contains("specified for attribute [urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:ibm:2.0:User:customAttributes.digilockerId] already exists."))
                block:
                    - return: >
                        {
                            "message_id" : "WFURATMI006E",
                            "message_description" : "This DigiLocker account is already associated with another user. log in with the associated account or use a different DigiLocker account. If the issues persist, contact your system administrator."
                        }
            # - if: # CSIAI0047E : create user user already exsist 
            #     match: >
            #         has(context.crearteUserStatus.error) && (context.crearteUserStatus.error != "")  && (context.crearteUserStatus.error.contains("CSIAI0047E"))
            #     block:
            #         - return: >
            #             {
            #                 "message_id" : "WFURATMI008E",
            #                 "message_description" : "A user with this username already exists. Please log in using that username or provide a different email. If the issues persist, contact your system administrator."
            #             }
            - return: > 
                {
                    "message_id" : "WFURATMI007E",
                    "message_description" : "User registration failed due to an unexpected issue. If the issues persist, contact your system administrator."
                }
    # - return: >
    #     {
    #         "session_error" : context.session_error,
    #         "trnxId_not_found_error" : context.trnxId_not_found_error,
    #         "digi_profile_validation_eerror" : context.digi_profile_validation_eerror,
    #         "aadhaar_consent_error" : context.aadhaar_consent_error,
    #         "digilocker_fetch_error" : context.digilocker_fetch_error,
    #         "aadhaar_xml_fetch_error" : context.aadhaar_xml_fetch_error,
    #         "user_consent_error" : context.user_consent_error,
    #         "crearte_user_error" : context.crearte_user_error,
    #         "setu_init_error" : context.setu_init_error,
    #         "cache_set_error" : context.cache_set_error
    #     }

# Assisted by AI - DigiLocker Get Aadhaar Details Evaluator
statements:
  # Get secrets
  - context: apiCreds := "<api_creds>"
  - context: apiBaseUrl := "<api_base_url>"
  
  # Ensure base URL has https:// prefix
  - context: >
      fullBaseUrl := context.apiBaseUrl.startsWith("http://") || context.apiBaseUrl.startsWith("https://") ? context.apiBaseUrl : "https://" + context.apiBaseUrl
  
  # Get requestId from context with null check
  - context: >
        requestId := has(context.requestId) && context.requestId != null ? context.requestId : ""
  
  # Validate requestId is not empty
  - if:
      match: >
        context.requestId == ""
      block:
        - return: >
            {
              "photo": "",
              "name": "",
              "dob": "",
              "ifErrorAX": "true",
              "errordesc": "Missing request ID",
              "errCode": "ERAX0001",
              "errMessage": "requestId cannot be an empty string"
            }
  
  # Call DigiLocker geteAadhaar API
  - context: >
      digilockerResponse := hc.Post(
        context.fullBaseUrl + "/api/v3/digilocker-v2/geteAadhaar",
        {
          "Content-Type": "application/json",
          "authorization": context.apiCreds
        },
        jsonToString({"requestId": context.requestId})
      )
  
  # Handle 401 - Consent journey not completed yet
  - if:
      match: >
        string(context.digilockerResponse.statusCode) == "401"
      block:
        - return: >
            {
              "photo": "",
              "name": "",
              "dob": "",
              "ifErrorAX": "true",
              "errordesc": "Consent journey not completed",
              "errCode": "ERAX0002",
              "errMessage": "The customer has not completed their digilocker consent journey yet"
            }
  
  # Handle 409 - Aadhaar not consented (Upstream Down)
  - if:
      match: >
        string(context.digilockerResponse.statusCode) == "409"
      block:
        - return: >
            {
              "photo": "",
              "name": "",
              "dob": "",
              "ifErrorAX": "true",
              "errordesc": "Aadhaar not consented",
              "errCode": "ERAX0008",
              "errMessage": "User did not provide consent for Aadhaar document"
            }
  
  # Handle 400 - Multiple scenarios
  - if:
      match: >
        string(context.digilockerResponse.statusCode) == "400"
      block:
        - context: >
            errorReason := has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.reason) && context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.reason != null ? context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.reason : ""
        - context: >
            errorMessage := has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.message) && context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.message != null ? context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.message : ""
        - if:
            match: >
              context.errorReason == "BAD_REQUEST"
            block:
              - return: >
                  {
                    "photo": "",
                    "name": "",
                    "dob": "",
                    "ifErrorAX": "true",
                    "errordesc": "Invalid request ID",
                    "errCode": "ERAX0003",
                    "errMessage": context.errorMessage
                  }
        - if:
            match: >
              context.errorMessage.contains("denied")
            block:
              - return: >
                  {
                    "photo": "",
                    "name": "",
                    "dob": "",
                    "ifErrorAX": "true",
                    "errordesc": "User denied consent",
                    "errCode": "ERAX0004",
                    "errMessage": context.errorMessage
                  }
        - if:
            match: >
              context.errorMessage.contains("Expired")
            block:
              - return: >
                  {
                    "photo": "",
                    "name": "",
                    "dob": "",
                    "ifErrorAX": "true",
                    "errordesc": "Authorization expired",
                    "errCode": "ERAX0005",
                    "errMessage": context.errorMessage
                  }
        - return: >
            {
              "photo": "",
              "name": "",
              "dob": "",
              "ifErrorAX": "true",
              "errordesc": "Validation error",
              "errCode": "ERAX0006",
              "errMessage": context.errorMessage
            }
  
  # Handle non-200 status codes
  - if:
      match: >
        string(context.digilockerResponse.statusCode) != "200"
      block:
        - return: >
            {
              "photo": "",
              "name": "",
              "dob": "",
              "ifErrorAX": "true",
              "errordesc": "HTTP error",
              "errCode": "ERAX0007",
              "errMessage": "HTTP status code is not 200: " + string(context.digilockerResponse.statusCode)
            }
  
  # Handle 200 - Success, extract Aadhaar details
  - if:
      match: >
        !has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody) || context.digilockerResponse.responseBody == null
      block:
        - return: >
            {
              "photo": "",
              "name": "",
              "dob": "",
              "ifErrorAX": "true",
              "errordesc": "No response body",
              "errCode": "ERAX0009",
              "errMessage": "Response body is missing"
            }
  
  - if:
      match: >
        !has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result) || context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result == null
      block:
        - return: >
            {
              "photo": "",
              "name": "",
              "dob": "",
              "ifErrorAX": "true",
              "errordesc": "No result data",
              "errCode": "ERAX0010",
              "errMessage": "Result data is missing"
            }
  
  # Extract Aadhaar details with null checks
  - context: >
      photo := has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.photo) && context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.photo != null ? context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.photo : ""
  
  - context: >
      name := has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.name) && context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.name != null ? context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.name : ""
  
  - context: >
      dob := has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.dob) && context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.dob != null ? context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.dob : ""
  
  # Return success with Aadhaar details
  - return: >
      {
        "photo": context.photo,
        "name": context.name,
        "dob": context.dob,
        "ifErrorAX": "false"
      }

# Error Code Reference:
# ERAX0001 - Missing request ID (empty string or null)
# ERAX0002 - Consent journey not completed (401 status)
# ERAX0003 - Invalid request ID (BAD_REQUEST)
# ERAX0004 - User denied consent
# ERAX0005 - Authorization expired
# ERAX0006 - Other validation errors
# ERAX0007 - HTTP error (non-200 status code)
# ERAX0008 - Aadhaar not consented (409 Upstream Down)
# ERAX0009 - No response body
# ERAX0010 - No result data in response

statements:
  - context: crearteUserStatus := createUser(context.userData,{'notifyType':'EMAIL','acceptInitialPassword':'false'})
  - context: app_login_link := "https://<app-login-link>"
  - return : > 
        {
            "crearteUserStatus" : context.crearteUserStatus,
            "app_login_link" : context.app_login_link
        }

# Assisted by AI - DigiLocker Scope Evaluator
statements:
  # Get secrets
  - context: apiCreds := "<api_creds>"
  - context: apiBaseUrl := "<api_base_url>"
  
  # Ensure base URL has https:// prefix
  - context: >
      fullBaseUrl := context.apiBaseUrl.startsWith("http://") || context.apiBaseUrl.startsWith("https://") ? context.apiBaseUrl : "https://" + context.apiBaseUrl
  
  # Get requestId from context with null check
  - context: >
        requestId := has(context.requestId) && context.requestId != null ? context.requestId : ""
  
  # Validate requestId is not empty
  - if:
      match: >
        context.requestId == ""
      block:
        - return: >
            {
              "valid": "false",
              "aadhaar_consented": "false",
              "errordesc": "Missing request ID",
              "errCode": "ERSP0001",
              "errMessage": "Request ID should not be an empty string"
            }
  
  # Call DigiLocker getScope API
  - context: >
      digilockerResponse := hc.Post(
        context.fullBaseUrl + "/api/v3/digilocker-v2/getScope",
        {
          "Content-Type": "application/json",
          "authorization": context.apiCreds
        },
        jsonToString({"requestId": context.requestId})
      )
  
  # Handle 400 - Could be invalid requestId, user denied, expired, or validation error
  - if:
      match: >
        string(context.digilockerResponse.statusCode) == "400"
      block:
        - context: >
            errorReason := has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.reason) && context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.reason != null ? context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.reason : ""
        - context: >
            errorMessage := has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.message) && context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.message != null ? context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.message : ""
        - if:
            match: >
              context.errorReason == "BAD_REQUEST"
            block:
              - return: >
                  {
                    "valid": "false",
                    "aadhaar_consented": "false",
                    "errordesc": "Invalid request ID",
                    "errCode": "ERSP0002",
                    "errMessage": context.errorMessage
                  }
        - if:
            match: >
              context.errorMessage.contains("denied")
            block:
              - return: >
                  {
                    "valid": "false",
                    "aadhaar_consented": "false",
                    "errordesc": "User denied consent",
                    "errCode": "ERSP0003",
                    "errMessage": context.errorMessage
                  }
        - if:
            match: >
              context.errorMessage.contains("Expired")
            block:
              - return: >
                  {
                    "valid": "false",
                    "aadhaar_consented": "false",
                    "errordesc": "Authorization expired",
                    "errCode": "ERSP0008",
                    "errMessage": context.errorMessage
                  }
        - return: >
            {
              "valid": "false",
              "aadhaar_consented": "false",
              "errordesc": "Validation error",
              "errCode": "ERSP0004",
              "errMessage": context.errorMessage
            }
  
  # Handle 401 - Consent journey not completed yet
  - if:
      match: >
        string(context.digilockerResponse.statusCode) == "401"
      block:
        - return: >
            {
              "valid": "false",
              "aadhaar_consented": "false",
              "errordesc": "Consent journey not completed",
              "errCode": "ERSP0005",
              "errMessage": "The customer has not completed their digilocker consent journey yet"
            }
  
  # Handle 200 - Success, check scope
  - context: >
      scopeArray := has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.scope) && context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.scope != null ? context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.scope : []
  
  # Convert scope array to string for easier checking
  - context: >
      scopeString := jsonToString(context.scopeArray)
  
  # Check if Aadhaar is in scope (looking for "ADHAR" in the scope string)
  - context: >
      aadhaarConsented := context.scopeString.contains("ADHAR")
  
  # Check if scope is empty
  - if:
      match: >
        size(context.scopeArray) == 0
      block:
        - return: >
            {
              "valid": "false",
              "aadhaar_consented": "false",
              "errordesc": "No document selected",
              "errCode": "ERSP0006",
              "errMessage": "User completed journey without selecting any document"
            }
  
  # Check if Aadhaar is not consented
  - if:
      match: >
        !context.aadhaarConsented
      block:
        - return: >
            {
              "valid": "false",
              "aadhaar_consented": "false",
              "errordesc": "Aadhaar not consented",
              "errCode": "ERSP0007",
              "errMessage": "User did not provide consent for Aadhaar document"
            }
  
  # Return success with scope details
  - return: >
      {
        "valid": "true",
        "aadhaar_consented": "true"
      }

# Error Code Reference:
# ERSP0001 - Missing request ID (empty string or null)
# ERSP0002 - Invalid request ID (BAD_REQUEST from API)
# ERSP0003 - User denied consent (AUTH_FAIL with 400 status)
# ERSP0004 - Other validation errors (400 status, other reasons)
# ERSP0005 - Consent journey not completed (401 status)
# ERSP0006 - No document selected (empty scope array)
# ERSP0007 - Aadhaar not consented (scope exists but no ADHAR)
# ERSP0008 - Authorization expired

# Assisted by AI - DigiLocker Get Details Evaluator
statements:
  # Get secrets
  - context: apiCreds := "<api_creds>"
  - context: apiBaseUrl := "<api_base_url>"
  
  # Ensure base URL has https:// prefix
  - context: >
      fullBaseUrl := context.apiBaseUrl.startsWith("http://") || context.apiBaseUrl.startsWith("https://") ? context.apiBaseUrl : "https://" + context.apiBaseUrl
  
  # Get requestId from context with null check
  - context: >
        requestId := has(context.requestId) && context.requestId != null ? context.requestId : ""
  
  # Validate requestId is not empty
  - if:
      match: >
        context.requestId == ""
      block:
        - return: >
            {
              "digi_id": "",
              "phone": "",
              "email": "",
              "ifError": "true",
              "errordesc": "Missing request ID",
              "errCode": "ERGD0001",
              "errMessage": "requestId cannot be an empty string"
            }
  
  # Call DigiLocker getDetails API
  - context: >
      digilockerResponse := hc.Post(
        context.fullBaseUrl + "/api/v3/digilocker-v2/getDetails",
        {
          "Content-Type": "application/json",
          "authorization": context.apiCreds
        },
        jsonToString({"requestId": context.requestId})
      )
  
  # Handle 401 - Consent journey not completed yet
  - if:
      match: >
        string(context.digilockerResponse.statusCode) == "401"
      block:
        - return: >
            {
              "digi_id": "",
              "phone": "",
              "email": "",
              "ifError": "true",
              "errordesc": "Consent journey not completed",
              "errCode": "ERGD0002",
              "errMessage": "The customer has not completed their digilocker consent journey yet"
            }
  
  # Handle 400 - Multiple scenarios
  - if:
      match: >
        string(context.digilockerResponse.statusCode) == "400"
      block:
        - context: >
            errorReason := has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.reason) && context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.reason != null ? context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.reason : ""
        - context: >
            errorMessage := has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.message) && context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.message != null ? context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.error.message : ""
        - if:
            match: >
              context.errorReason == "BAD_REQUEST"
            block:
              - return: >
                  {
                    "digi_id": "",
                    "phone": "",
                    "email": "",
                    "ifError": "true",
                    "errordesc": "Invalid request ID",
                    "errCode": "ERGD0003",
                    "errMessage": context.errorMessage
                  }
        - if:
            match: >
              context.errorMessage.contains("denied")
            block:
              - return: >
                  {
                    "digi_id": "",
                    "phone": "",
                    "email": "",
                    "ifError": "true",
                    "errordesc": "User denied consent",
                    "errCode": "ERGD0004",
                    "errMessage": context.errorMessage
                  }
        - if:
            match: >
              context.errorMessage.contains("Expired")
            block:
              - return: >
                  {
                    "digi_id": "",
                    "phone": "",
                    "email": "",
                    "ifError": "true",
                    "errordesc": "Authorization expired",
                    "errCode": "ERGD0005",
                    "errMessage": context.errorMessage
                  }
        - return: >
            {
              "digi_id": "",
              "phone": "",
              "email": "",
              "ifError": "true",
              "errordesc": "Validation error",
              "errCode": "ERGD0006",
              "errMessage": context.errorMessage
            }
  
  # Handle 200 - Success, extract user details
  - context: >
      userDetails := has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.userDetails) && context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.userDetails != null ? context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.userDetails : {}
  
  - context: >
      digiId := has(context.userDetails.digilockerid) && context.userDetails.digilockerid != null ? context.userDetails.digilockerid : ""
  
  - context: >
      phone := has(context.userDetails.mobile) && context.userDetails.mobile != null ? context.userDetails.mobile : ""
  
  - context: >
      email := has(context.userDetails.email) && context.userDetails.email != null ? context.userDetails.email : ""
  
  # Check if files array exists and contains Aadhaar
  - context: >
      filesArray := has(context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.files) && context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.files != null ? context.digilockerResponse.responseBody.result.files : []
  
  # Check if files array is empty
  - if:
      match: >
        size(context.filesArray) == 0
      block:
        - return: >
            {
              "digi_id": "",
              "phone": "",
              "email": "",
              "ifError": "true",
              "errordesc": "No documents found",
              "errCode": "ERGD0008",
              "errMessage": "User completed journey without selecting any document"
            }
  
  - context: >
      filesString := jsonToString(context.filesArray)
  
  - context: >
      hasAadhaar := context.filesString.contains("ADHAR")
  
  # If no Aadhaar found, return error
  - if:
      match: >
        !context.hasAadhaar
      block:
        - return: >
            {
              "digi_id": "",
              "phone": "",
              "email": "",
              "ifError": "true",
              "errordesc": "Aadhaar not consented",
              "errCode": "ERGD0007",
              "errMessage": "User did not provide consent for Aadhaar document"
            }
  
  # Return success with user details
  - return: >
      {
        "digi_id": context.digiId,
        "phone": context.phone,
        "email": context.email,
        "ifError": "false"
      }

# Error Code Reference:
# ERGD0001 - Missing request ID (empty string or null)
# ERGD0002 - Consent journey not completed (401 status)
# ERGD0003 - Invalid request ID (BAD_REQUEST)
# ERGD0004 - User denied consent
# ERGD0005 - Authorization expired
# ERGD0006 - Other validation errors
# ERGD0007 - Aadhaar not consented (no ADHAR in files array)
# ERGD0008 - No documents found (empty files array)

statements:
  # Get DigiLocker phone with null check
  - context: >
      digiPhone := has(context.phone) && context.phone != null ? context.phone : ""
#   - context: >
#       digiPhone := ""
  
  # Extract mobile phone with null checks
  - context: >
      mobilePhone := has(context.profile_mobile) && context.profile_mobile != null ? context.profile_mobile : ""
#   - context: >
#       mobilePhone := ""
  
  # Extract last 10 digits from DigiLocker phone - FIXED: substring(start, end)
  - context: >
      digiLast10 := context.digiPhone != "" && context.digiPhone.size() >= 10 ? context.digiPhone.substring(context.digiPhone.size() - 10, context.digiPhone.size()) : context.digiPhone
  
  # Extract last 10 digits from mobile phone - FIXED: substring(start, end)
  - context: >
      mobileLast10 := context.mobilePhone != "" && context.mobilePhone.size() >= 10 ? context.mobilePhone.substring(context.mobilePhone.size() - 10, context.mobilePhone.size()) : context.mobilePhone
  
  # Check if mobile phone has India country code
  - context: >
      mobileHasIndiaCode := context.mobilePhone != "" && (context.mobilePhone.contains("+91") || context.mobilePhone.contains("0091") || (context.mobilePhone.size() > 10 && context.mobilePhone.startsWith("91")))
  
  # Check mobile phone match - exact, contains, or last 10 digits
  - context: >
      mobilePhoneMatch := context.digiPhone == "" || context.mobilePhone == "" ? "no_match" : (context.digiPhone == context.mobilePhone ? "exact_match" : (context.mobilePhone.contains(context.digiPhone) ? "exact_match" : (context.digiLast10.size() == 10 && context.mobileLast10.size() == 10 && context.digiLast10 == context.mobileLast10 ? (context.mobileHasIndiaCode ? "matched" : "partial_match") : (context.mobilePhone.endsWith(context.digiPhone) ? "matched" : "no_match"))))
  
  # Overall phone match status
  - context: >
      phoneMatchStatus := context.digiPhone == "" ? "digi_missing" : (context.mobilePhone == "" ? "profile_missing" : (context.mobilePhoneMatch == "exact_match" ? "matched" :  "invalid"))
  
  # Return phone validation result
  - return: >
      {"phone_validation": {"digi_phone_no": context.digiPhone, "profile_phone_mobile": context.mobilePhone, "match_status": context.phoneMatchStatus}}

statements:
  # Get DigiLocker email with null check
  - context: >
      digiEmail := has(context.email) && context.email != null ? context.email : ""
#   - context: >
#       digiEmail := "visheshamin99@gmail.com"
  
  # Get user profile emails with null checks
  - context: >
      workEmail := has(context.profile_email) && context.profile_email != null ? context.profile_email : ""
#   - context: >
#       workEmail := "visheshamin99@gmail.com"
  

  # Email validation - case insensitive using regex
  - context: >
      emailMatchStatus := context.digiEmail == "" ? "digi_missing" : (context.workEmail == "" ? "profile_missing" : (context.digiEmail == context.workEmail || context.workEmail.matches("(?i)" + context.digiEmail) ? "matched" : "invalid"))
  
  # Return email validation result
  - return: >
      {"email_validation": {"digi_email": context.digiEmail, "profile_email": context.workEmail, "match_status": context.emailMatchStatus}}

statements:
  # Get DigiLocker name with null check
  - context: >
      digiName := has(context.name) && context.name != null ? context.name : ""
#   - context: >
#       digiName := "vishesh p amin"
  
  # Get user profile name with null checks
  - context: >
      userName := (has(context.profile_formatted_name) && (context.profile_formatted_name != null)) ? context.profile_formatted_name : ""
#   - context: >
#       userName := null
  
  # Name validation - case insensitive using regex
  - context: >
      nameMatchStatus := context.digiName == "" ? "digi_missing" : (context.userName == "" ? "profile_missing" : (context.digiName == context.userName || context.userName.matches("(?i)" + context.digiName) ? "matched" : "invalid"))
  
  # Return name validation result
  - return: >
      {"name_validation": {"digi_name": context.digiName, "profile_name": context.userName, "match_status": context.nameMatchStatus}}

statements:
  # Get DigiLocker DOB with null check
  - context: >
      digiDob := has(context.dob) && context.dob != null ? context.dob : ""
#   - context: >
#       digiDob := "10-07-1999"
  
  # Try to get DOB from standard SCIM birthDate field if it exists
  - context: >
      userDob := has(context.profile_dob) && context.profile_dob != null ? context.profile_dob : ""
#   - context: >
#       userDob := "10-07-1999"
  
  # DOB validation
  - context: >
      dobMatchStatus := context.digiDob == "" ? "digi_missing" : (context.userDob == "" ? "profile_missing" : (context.digiDob == context.userDob ? "matched" : "invalid"))
  
  # Return DOB validation result
  - return: >
      {"dob_validation": {"digi_dob": context.digiDob, "profile_dob": context.userDob, "match_status": context.dobMatchStatus}}

statements:
    # "userData": {
    #   "3": "email@email.com",
    #   "11": "+91XXXXXXXXXX",
    #   "19": "full name box",
    #   "32": "email@email.com", ("32" -  username )
    #   "dob": "XX-YY-YYYY"
    # }
    # extract profile_formatted_name, profile_email, profile_mobile, profile_dob
    - context : >
        profile_formatted_name := (has(context.cacheData) && has(context.cacheData.userData) && has(context.cacheData.userData,"19")) ? context.cacheData.userData["19"] : ""
    - context : >
        profile_email := (has(context.cacheData) && has(context.cacheData.userData) && has(context.cacheData.userData,"3")) ? context.cacheData.userData["3"] : ""
    - context : >
        profile_mobile := (has(context.cacheData) && has(context.cacheData.userData) && has(context.cacheData.userData,"11")) ? context.cacheData.userData["11"] : ""
    - context : >
        profile_dob := (has(context.cacheData) && has(context.cacheData.userData) && has(context.cacheData.userData,"dob")) ? context.cacheData.userData["dob"] : ""
    - return : > 
        {
            "profile_formatted_name" : context.profile_formatted_name,
            "profile_email" : context.profile_email,
            "profile_mobile" : context.profile_mobile,
            "profile_dob" : context.profile_dob
        }

statements:
    # check cache exsists
    - context : cache_exists := cache.Exists(context.trnxId)
    # get cache data  (if cache does not exsist it will give error and we have cache_exists to differenciate errors)
    # - context : cache_get := (cache.GetAndDelete(context.trnxId))
    - context : cache_get := cache.Get(context.trnxId)
    # craete a valid_cache boolean variable for future error refrence
    - context : >
        valid_cache := (has(context.cache_exists) && has(context.cache_get) && (context.cache_exists.isSuccessful == true) && (context.cache_exists.value == "true") && (context.cache_get.isSuccessful == true) && has(context.cache_get.value)) ? true : false
    - return : >
        {
            "valid_cache" : context.valid_cache,
            "cache_get" : context.cache_get
        }

statements: 
    # setting  email as uername 
    - context: updatedDataWithEnabled_1 := context.userFormData.userData.put("userName", context.userFormData.userData[context.userFormData.usernameAttribute])
    - context: updatedDataWithEnabled_2 := context.userFormData.userData.put("6", context.userFormData.userData["19"])
    - context: updatedData := context.userFormData.put("userData",context.updatedDataWithEnabled_2)
    - return : >
        {
            "userFormData" : context.updatedData
        }

statements:
    # if cache is valid extract cache data as a json
    - context : cacheData := stringToJson(context.cache_get.value)
    # validate if session is valid by checking digilocker id from cache and from url redirected by digilocker
    - context : >
        valid_session := (has(context.cacheData) && has(context.cacheData.digilocker_request_id) && has(context.requestId) && (context.requestId == context.cacheData.digilocker_request_id)) ? true : false
    - return : >
        {
            "cacheData" : context.cacheData,
            "valid_session" : context.valid_session
        }

statements:
  # Get DigiLocker DOB with null check digi_missing matched
  - context: >
      valid_digi_profile_match := (has(context.email_validation) && has(context.email_validation.match_status) 
                                    && (context.email_validation.match_status == "digi_missing" || context.email_validation.match_status == "matched")
                                    && has(context.dob_validation) && has(context.dob_validation.match_status) 
                                    && (context.dob_validation.match_status == "digi_missing" || context.dob_validation.match_status == "matched")
                                    && has(context.name_validation) && has(context.name_validation.match_status) 
                                    && (context.name_validation.match_status == "digi_missing" || context.name_validation.match_status == "matched")
                                    && has(context.phone_validation)) && has(context.phone_validation.match_status)
                                    && (context.phone_validation.match_status == "digi_missing" || context.phone_validation.match_status == "matched") 
                                    ? true : false

  - return: >
      {"valid_digi_profile_match": context.valid_digi_profile_match}
